THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRITT, ROY GARCIA, JACKIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 811 GEARY STREET, #405 $1,325.80 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.80, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS AS PER COST BILL.
